questions.text: When you order online, who usually decides which delivery company will ship your order?
options: I choose from options the merchant offers
I request a specific courier directly
I don't pay attention to who delivers
questions.rationale: Reveals whether customers have agency in courier selection — a key gap for understanding consumer-driven brand choice.

questions.text: If you could choose ONE delivery company to handle all your future online orders, which would it be?
questions.rationale: Captures forward-looking single-brand preference, isolating true competitive pull beyond past usage.

questions.text: Have you ever experienced a failed delivery, damaged item, or lost shipment? Please describe what happened and how the courier handled it.
questions.rationale: Open feedback on problem-resolution experience uncovers service-recovery strengths and weaknesses missed by satisfaction ratings.

questions.text: When ordering online, do you prefer paying cash on delivery or prepaying by card/wallet?
questions.rationale: Captures payment preference, a key behavioral driver for courier selection in Egypt.

questions.text: How much does the shipping fee influence your decision to complete an order or choose a specific courier?
options: It is the main deciding factor
questions.rationale: Measures price sensitivity to shipping cost, critical for courier pricing strategy.

questions.text: After how many days from placing an order do you consider the delivery late?
questions.rationale: Defines customer expectations on delivery time-windows to benchmark courier SLAs.

questions.text: If your preferred courier did not offer cash on delivery, what would you most likely do?
options: Switch to a courier that offers COD
Pay prepaid anyway with same courier
Ask the seller to use a different courier
questions.rationale: Reveals how strongly COD availability drives courier switching behavior.

questions.text: In your own words, what would make you willing to pay a higher shipping fee for a delivery?
questions.rationale: Open-ended insight into value drivers that justify premium pricing beyond standard satisfaction dimensions.
